decision: Implement Vapi custom-tool webhook before native phone app.
rationale: The hackathon call-in workflow can be demonstrated with the existing Vapi number and local tool server.
The objective assumes camera access is unavailable while other sensors may be available.

decision: Add an offline-first LLM router (local Ollama -> Nebius -> OpenAI) with an optional Vapi custom-LLM endpoint, kept separate from the deterministic tool layer.
rationale: Satisfies 'processing is offline' (verified live against qwen2.5:1.5b) and makes Nebius a drop-in upgrade once credits land, without adding hallucination risk to the grounded tools.
